theme_strategy: Dark mode default-friendly. 'Old Money Tech' aesthetic: high-contrast, crisp containers, and a heavy emphasis on editorial typography.

headings.styles: Tracking-tight, crisp, high contrast. Never use generic Inter for headings.

body.styles: Highly readable, elegant serif for long-form content, giving a premium editorial feel (Josh Comeau style).

code.styles: Strictly for code blocks, inline code, and technical data. Use text-sm for better inline alignment.

colors.rules: Avoid purple/violet AI slop gradients. Stick to a monochromatic base with one sharp accent color for links/interactive elements. Use solid or highly subtle borders.

layouts.homepage: Card-based bento grid (grid-cols-1 md:grid-cols-2 lg:grid-cols-3) with a featured hero article spanning full width. Generous spacing (gap-6 or gap-8).
layouts.article_page: max-w-3xl centered for readability. Sticky TOC on the right side for desktop (xl:block). Fixed reading progress bar at the very top. Code playground blocks embedded in content.
layouts.spacing: Use generous paddings (py-16, py-24). Article paragraphs should have loose line-height (leading-relaxed or leading-loose).

components.cards: Flat design, 1px solid border (border-border), rounded-xl. On hover: -translate-y-1, subtle glow or border color shift.
components.buttons: Pill-shaped or slightly rounded (rounded-md) sharp buttons. High contrast (black on white or white on black).
components.reading_progress: Fixed position top-0 left-0 h-1 bg-[#0055FF] z-50.
components.language_switcher: Subtle toggle in the article header. Pill-shaped, active state gets a solid background.
components.sticky_toc: Position sticky top-24. Small text (text-sm), mono font for list items, muted colors until active. Must use IntersectionObserver to highlight current active section.

visual_enhancers.micro_interactions: Hover states on cards (image zoom, border highlight). Smooth scrolling (Lenis recommended).
visual_enhancers.shadows: Minimal. Rely on 1px borders instead of drop shadows. If used, use extremely subtle ambient shadows.

hero_article.description: Abstract technical code pattern for main featured tech article.

desk_setup_1.description: Minimal desk setup for Career/Indie Hacker posts.

desk_setup_2.description: Clean monitor setup for Tools Review.

ai_concept.description: AI letters for AI Tools & Prompt Engineering pillar.

coding_workspace.description: Developer coding in dark workspace for Tutorial Coding posts.

instructions_to_main_agent: Implement Sandpack (by CodeSandbox) or a highly stylized syntax highlighter for interactive code playgrounds.
Use custom prose classes for MDX rendering to apply the Serif font for body and appropriate spacing.
Ensure dark mode is the default, and implement next-themes for toggling.
Ensure the TOC uses an IntersectionObserver to highlight the current section.
For all interactive elements (buttons, links, inputs, form submissions, language switchers, dark mode toggles), include data-testid attributes.
Build the application using .js/.jsx extensions instead of .tsx.
UNIVERSAL_GUIDELINES_FOR_MAIN_AGENT: Do not use generic centered layouts. Use clear structural alignments.
Create depth through layered design elements with z-index hierarchy, preferring crisp borders over muddy shadows.
NEVER use completely transparent backgrounds for headers/sticky elements; use backdrop-blur and a semi-transparent background.
Apply precise transition effects (e.g., transition: transform 0.2s ease) instead of universal transition: all.
NEVER use placeholder URLs for images; always use the provided Unsplash URLs.
Include hover, focus, and active states for all interactive elements to ensure accessibility.
Ensure text contrast ratios meet APCA/WCAG standards, especially over dark backgrounds.
